reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros. Baños limpios. En el centro de esquel. Es full. Las 3 veces que fuimos nunca esperamos, vacaciones de invierno. Aceptan tarjetas. Todo bastante nuevo. Muy Buen servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants. Clean restrooms. Located in downtown Esquel. It's always busy. We never had to wait the three times we went, even during winter break. They accept credit cards. Everything is quite new. Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhaWI2RVN3EAE
